error.problem: User gets lost in deep navigation hierarchy

causes.cause: No breadcrumbs to show current location

solution.step: Audit navigation depth; flatten if exceeding 3 levels
Implement breadcrumb trail in top navigation
Add clear active state indicators to nav links
Consider a "quick nav" feature for power users

error.problem: Search returns no results for valid queries

causes.cause: Search index not updated after content changes
Query parser doesn't understand natural language

solution.step: Implement automatic search index rebuild on content changes
Add query suggestions for typos and similar terms
Lower minimum query length to 2 characters
Add "did you mean" suggestions

error.problem: Sidebar doesn't work on mobile devices

solution.step: Use transform: translateX() instead of left/right positioning
Prevent body scroll when drawer is open
Raise drawer z-index above all content
Test on actual iOS and Android devices

error.problem: Theme doesn't persist across page navigation

causes.cause: Theme state not stored in localStorage

solution.step: Initialize theme from localStorage before render
Add theme script to HTML head to prevent flash
Ensure only one ThemeProvider exists
Use context for theme distribution, not prop drilling

error.problem: Code blocks display incorrectly or lack highlighting

causes.cause: Wrong language specified in code fence
Syntax highlighter not loaded for language

solution.step: Verify all code blocks have correct language tags
Check that syntax highlighter supports required languages
Ensure highlighter CSS is included in build
Add fallback plain text view for unsupported languages

error.problem: Documentation site loads slowly or has layout shift

causes.cause: Large markdown files without lazy loading
Images not optimized or lazy loaded

solution.step: Implement code splitting for markdown content
Add lazy loading for images below fold
Defer non-critical scripts
Preload critical fonts and CSS

strategy.name: graceful_degradation
strategy.description: When advanced features fail, fall back to simpler alternatives

example.fallback: Use basic text search with keyword matching
Show static code block with copy functionality

example.scenario: Dark mode CSS fails to load
example.fallback: Always use light mode, hide theme toggle

strategy.name: user_feedback
strategy.description: Clearly communicate errors and recovery options to users

guidelines.guideline: Show toast notifications for recoverable errors
Provide clear error messages with suggested actions
Log errors silently for debugging without bothering users
